plugins.name: aio-epub-translate
plugins.description: AI-driven EPUB translation using jread CLI. Five opinionated skills: aio-epub-setup (project setup), aio-epub-research (book research, terminology, web search), aio-epub-translate (chapter translation), aio-editor-review (quality review), aio-epub-package (export).

plugins.name: aio-remove-bg
plugins.description: Remove background from images and trim transparent edges. Supports threshold-based (fast) and AI-based (rembg) methods.

plugins.name: aio-worktree
plugins.description: Manage git worktrees for parallel development. Create worktrees, sync changes (spotlight), merge branches, and cleanup.

plugins.name: aio-epub-packing
plugins.description: Generate professional EPUB ebooks from Markdown files with auto-generated neo-brutalism covers.

plugins.name: aio-youtube
plugins.description: Search YouTube and extract video transcripts using yt-dlp.

plugins.name: aio-gherkin-refine
plugins.description: Refines ambiguous user requests into structured Gherkin format (Given/When/Then) before implementation.

plugins.name: aio-claude-manager
plugins.description: Enable/disable skills based on project context. Reduce skill clutter for specific project types.

plugins.name: aio-neobrutalism
plugins.description: Neobrutalism design system bootstrapper. Detects tech stack, generates CSS tokens, and transforms existing UI components with bold borders, hard shadows, vibrant colors.

plugins.name: aio-bun-fullstack-setup
plugins.description: Scaffold and setup Bun fullstack projects. Scaffold mode detects existing files and generates only what is missing. Single port API + static frontend with Vite proxy in dev.

plugins.name: aio-mental-models
plugins.description: Objective-driven decision advisor using 50+ mental models. Guides you through model selection, application, synthesis, and stress-testing for decisions, trade-offs, and complex problems.

plugins.name: aio-reflect
plugins.description: Learn from Claude Code sessions to extract reusable knowledge. Deep JSONL parsing extracts token usage, cost, work modes, subagents, tasks, compaction, session chains, and file operations for comprehensive reflection.

plugins.name: aio-monitoring-observability
plugins.description: Monitoring and observability strategy, implementation, and troubleshooting. Metrics design (Golden Signals, RED/USE), distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry), alerting, SLOs, dashboards, log aggregation, and tool selection. Includes 7 automation scripts and production-ready templates.

plugins.name: aio-ios-device-debug
plugins.description: Debug iOS apps on physical devices. Build, install, launch, capture logs, pull crash reports, and analyze crashes from the terminal.

plugins.name: aio-codebase-oracle
plugins.description: Comprehensive codebase analysis and documentation powered by GitNexus knowledge graph and LSP precision tools. Zero infrastructure required. Oracle writes architecture docs, module docs, and interactive HTML viewers.

plugins.name: aio-grafana-diagram
plugins.description: Dashboard diagram generator. Analyzes codebase to auto-generate Mermaid diagrams with metric binding for Grafana dashboards. Flowcharts, sequence diagrams, gantt charts, state diagrams with dynamic metric-driven coloring.

plugins.name: aio-jira
plugins.description: Jira operations through MCP tools. Issue management, sprint tracking, workflow transitions, comments, JQL search, and development information. Auto-installs jira-mcp server if missing.

plugins.name: aio-react-minimal-effects
plugins.description: Minimize useEffect in React 19. Scan mode finds and fixes problematic effects in existing code. Covers React Compiler, new hooks (useActionState, useOptimistic), ref as prop, and proper patterns.

plugins.name: aio-mermaid
plugins.description: Generate shareable MinimalMermaid diagram URLs. Compress mermaid code into shareable links.

plugins.name: aio-code-review
plugins.description: Ultimate code review with GitNexus knowledge graph analytics, domain-specific skill detection (Go, iOS, React, XState, observability), 5 core + 4 conditional parallel review agents, and a critic meta-review with confidence scoring.

plugins.name: aio-xstate
plugins.description: XState v5 strict ruleset for TypeScript state machines. setup().createMachine() patterns, design-first planning, params-first typing, anti-god-machine enforcement, actor patterns (fromPromise, fromCallback, fromObservable, fromTransition), invoke vs spawnChild, and React integration.

plugins.name: aio-debug
plugins.description: REACTIVE debugging — systematic debug & fix orchestrator for bugs, errors, and test failures. Four-phase pipeline: codebase context → root cause investigation → minimal fix → code review validation. Circuit breaker escalation after 3 failed attempts. NOT for planning new features — use aio-deep-plan instead.

plugins.name: aio-golang-mastery
plugins.description: Complete Go development skill with lint mode (7-step tooling chain: build, vet, golangci-lint, govulncheck, nilaway, deadcode, race detection). Covers idiomatic patterns, error handling, concurrency, interfaces, generics, testing, project structure, production hardening, and gRPC. Based on Google/Uber style guides. Updated for Go 1.25.

plugins.name: aio-feedback
plugins.description: Submit feedback, bug reports, feature requests, and plugin requests for aiocean plugins directly from Claude Code via GitHub Issues.

plugins.name: aio-tui
plugins.description: Go Bubbletea TUI development guide. Architecture (TEA pattern), lipgloss styling, production patterns (column alignment, parallel fetch, auto-refresh, tab navigation, filter/search, scroll, mouse hover, delta tracking), and critical gotchas.

plugins.name: aio-deep-plan
plugins.description: PROACTIVE planning toolkit — use before writing code to understand codebase structure and plan changes. Five skills: discover (find relevant code), map (structural analysis), snapshot (baseline), plan (implementation planning with re-anchoring protocol), review (post-implementation check). Combines GitNexus hybrid search/knowledge graph and LSP. NOT for debugging bugs — use aio-debug instead.

plugins.name: aio-confluence
plugins.description: Confluence CLI/MCP for page management, CQL search, content operations, comments, and space listing via confluence-mcp.

plugins.name: aio-github
plugins.description: GitHub CLI/MCP for repository, pull request, issue management, code review, and file operations via github-mcp.

plugins.name: aio-gitlab
plugins.description: GitLab CLI/MCP for merge requests, pipelines, jobs, branch protection, and git flow operations via gitlab-mcp.

plugins.name: aio-rag-kit
plugins.description: RAG Kit CLI/MCP for Qdrant vector database operations: create collections, index content, and semantic search via rag-kit.

plugins.name: aio-research-kit
plugins.description: Structured 10-phase research framework CLI. Initialize research projects, validate structure, and execute systematic research via research-cli.

plugins.name: aio-tanca
plugins.description: Tanca CLI/MCP for employee timekeeping, shift management, check-in/check-out, and clock logs via tanca-mcp.

plugins.name: aio-x
plugins.description: X/Twitter CLI/MCP for tweets, threads, search, engagement, moderation, and list operations via x-mcp.

plugins.name: aio-google-workspace
plugins.description: Google Workspace operations via gws CLI. Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Tasks, Slides, Chat, and cross-service workflows (standup, meeting prep, weekly digest).

plugins.name: aio-install
plugins.description: Install, enable, disable, and list aiocean plugins for the current project via settings.local.json.

plugins.name: aio-browser-cookie
plugins.description: Extract browser cookies with rookiepy and reuse them for authenticated requests or Netscape cookie exports.
